notes: Iter#75 NEW AXIS: VPVR POC reversion (4h) with static macro calendar overlay for 2022-2026.
Static calendar embeds known FOMC / CPI / NFP / PCE release dates so the regime gate does not require a live feed.
Entries are blocked within `macro_buffer_bars` of a high-impact event and re-enabled only after the post-event volatility normalises (`atr >= post_event_atr_min_mult * atr_ma`).
Primary timeframe 4h matches the smark directive (1m / 15m / 4h, NOT 1d).
Distinct from vpvr_stable_depeg_regime_4h_20260716 (which uses stablecoin depeg premium) and vpvr_reversion_4h_stablecoin_netflow_20260713 (which uses netflow).
